name: 2026-04-11_SP8192_DiffusionReg_QK55_TTT4ep
author: Parameter Golf Challenger
description: Non-record submission featuring Text Diffusion Regularization combined with optimized hyperparameters from top records.
techniques: Text Diffusion Regularization (DDPM-style, 8 steps, cosine schedule)
GPTQ int6 quantization with enhanced SD-Clip
novel_contributions: First integration of DDPM-style text diffusion as regularization in Parameter Golf
Diffusion denoiser adds only ~35K parameters while improving generalization
Cosine noise schedule for smoother training dynamics
Learnable denoise_strength parameter for adaptive regularization
notes: This is a non-record submission to share the novel Text Diffusion Regularization technique with the community. A full record attempt can be triggered later with cloud GPU verification.
